assertions.title: Invalid or unreachable URL shows error

steps.action: Clear localStorage and reload to start fresh
steps.expected: Clean state with only Default Tokenlist
steps.observed: Clean state with only Default Tokenlist (87 tokens on Base)

steps.action: Open settings panel via gear icon
steps.expected: Settings modal opens with tokenlist input
steps.observed: Settings modal opens with tokenlist input and Load button

steps.expected: Error message shown, no list entry created
steps.observed: Error message 'Invalid URL format' shown in red. Only Default Tokenlist present — no new entry created.

steps.expected: Error message shown, no list entry created
steps.observed: Error message 'URL must use HTTPS' shown in red. Only Default Tokenlist present — no new entry created.

steps.expected: Error message shown, no list entry created
steps.observed: Error message 'Error: Failed to fetch remote URL: fetch failed' shown in red. Only Default Tokenlist present — NO list entry created. Fix confirmed.

steps.action: Verify localStorage has no entries from failed attempts
steps.expected: customTokenlists is null, no keys stored
steps.observed: localStorage is empty — no customTokenlists key, no entries persisted from any failed add attempt.

evidence.consoleErrors: Only favicon.ico 404 (cosmetic, ignored) and expected fetch failure for unreachable URL

assertions.title: All settings preserved across page reload

steps.action: Clear localStorage and reload to start fresh
steps.observed: Clean state with only Default Tokenlist

steps.action: Open settings and add Uniswap Labs Default list (https://tokens.uniswap.org)
steps.expected: Custom list added with token count
steps.observed: Uniswap Labs Default added, 87 tokens on Base
Default Tokenlist switch unchecked (grayed out), Uniswap Labs Default remains checked (ON)

steps.expected: Both customTokenlists and defaultTokenlistEnabled keys present
steps.observed: customTokenlists: [{url:'https://tokens.uniswap.org', enabled:true, name:'Uniswap Labs Default'}], defaultTokenlistEnabled: 'false'. Both keys persisted.

steps.expected: State captured showing Default OFF, custom ON
steps.observed: Screenshot shows Default Tokenlist OFF (grayed, unchecked toggle), Uniswap Labs Default ON (blue toggle)
Default Tokenlist: OFF (switch unchecked, grayed out). Uniswap Labs Default: ON (switch checked, blue toggle), 87 tokens. Custom list URL preserved. All toggle states preserved. Fix confirmed.

steps.expected: Same keys and values as before reload
steps.observed: customTokenlists and defaultTokenlistEnabled both present with same values as before reload.

evidence.network: Custom list re-fetched on reload via /tokenlist/proxy

frictions.description: Auto-refresh timer (15s) can interfere with UI testing. Cleared via clearInterval(window._refreshTimer) after each page load.

summary: Tested 2 previously failed assertions after fixes: both now pass. VAL-MULTI-007: all three error cases (invalid URL, non-HTTPS, unreachable HTTPS) show descriptive errors and create NO list entry — the unreachable URL case that previously created an error-state entry is now fixed. VAL-CROSS-007: default tokenlist toggle state is now persisted via 'defaultTokenlistEnabled' localStorage key and survives page reload — previously it was resetting to ON.
